title: lithocarpus lauterbachii
intro: Lithocarpus lauterbachii, also known as the New Guinea Lithocarpus, is a species of tree in the beech family, Fagaceae, native to New Guinea. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lithocarpus lauterbachii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and protect against oxidative stress. In traditional medicine, the plant is often used to prepare teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are believed to promote overall well-being and boost the immune system.
